suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When mission guidance documents a known unrelated full-suite test failure, allow the mission-approved targeted test commands plus typecheck instead of treating `bun run test` as the only acceptable validator.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission `AGENTS.md` and `.factory/library/environment.md` document the known `apps/browser-executor/src/browserLeaseDO.test.ts` timeout blocker, round 1 scrutiny recorded the resulting deviation from `.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md` step 6, and the round 2 fix review flagged the same mismatch again.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a test-writing checkpoint that UI assertions must target the specific rendered control or cell instead of whole-row substring matches when fixtures repeat the label under test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `.factory/validation/generation-ui/scrutiny/reviews/cross-area-integration.json` found that `apps/web/src/router.test.tsx` asserted whole-row text contains `Generated`, `Manual`, and `Transcript-derived`, but the mocked persona names already contained those words, creating false-positive badge coverage before the round 2 fix corrected the test shape.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Call out Convex validator/schema drift explicitly when Convex validators and internal Zod schemas both define the same generated payload shape, so generated API types do not become looser than the runtime contract.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `.factory/validation/generation-ui/scrutiny/reviews/fix-expansion-payload-bugs.json` found `convex/batchGeneration.ts` made `generatedUser.tensionSeed` optional in the Convex validator while `convex/batchGeneration/expansion.ts` still required it in `expandedSyntheticUserPersistedSchema`; the round 2 fix then had to align those layers.
